title: lilium candidum var. peregrinum
intro: Lilium candidum var. peregrinum, also known as the Madonna Lily or White Lily, is a species of lily that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lilium candidum var. peregrinum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
